title: Fetal weight by week: reference ranges and red flags
excerpt: How ultrasound estimates fetal weight, what affects it, and when to ask your clinician — Medlatec, ACOG aligned.
content:
## Why track fetal weight?

Estimated fetal weight on ultrasound helps check growth against gestational age. It is **not exact** but useful on a growth chart.

## Factors involved

- Gestational age accuracy, singleton vs twins.
- Genetics, maternal nutrition, diabetes, hypertension.

## Ask your clinician if

- Weight <10th or >90th percentile on your unit's chart.
- Slowing growth across repeated scans.
- Reduced fetal movement.

## Nutrition support

Adequate protein, iron, and folate; avoid extreme dieting or rapid gain without medical advice.
